---
title: "Data Wrangling for Shark Attack Analysis"
author: "Vedika Shirtekar"
format: pdf
---

## Data Wrangling for Shark Attack Analysis


```{r}
#install.packages("readxl")
#install.packages("here")
#install.packages("janitor")

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(janitor)
```




```{r}
shark <- read_excel(here("shark-attack-tableau-dashboard", "data", "GSAF5.xls"))
glimpse(shark)
head(shark)
```



```{r}

```


```{r}

```



```{r}

``` 



```{r}

```


```{r}

```

```{r}

```
```{r}

```


```{r}

```
```{r}

```
